title: USD Inherits Composition Spec Coverage Ledger

normative_source.rule: Only the AOUSD core specification at aousd/specifications-public v1.0.1 is normative for this ledger. This ledger covers bounded direct, recursive, and implied inheritPaths namespace composition.

status_values.implemented: In scope for the inherits-namespace-source contract and covered by goldens.
status_values.partial: A bounded subset is included and later contracts must extend it.
status_values.deferred: Specified behavior intentionally not included in this first inherits contract.
status_values.out_of_scope: Belongs to another subsystem or future skill.

coverage_rules: The provider composes direct inheritPaths and delegates stage traversal to usd-stage-population.
The provider consumes a base namespace source, not parser-local USDA syntax.
A generated target must include bounded recursive direct inherit expansion and implied upstream inherit arcs represented by the base source before claiming this contract.
A generated target must not claim full value resolution, inherits authored inside selected variants, or unbounded recursive behavior from this provider.

obligations: Read direct inherit path items from the base source-visible inheritPaths field.
Map the inherited source prim and descendants onto the inherit-authoring prim path.
Preserve same-path local layer-stack target opinions as stronger than inherited source opinions.
Do not flatten weaker reference-introduced target opinions ahead of implied upstream inherited opinions.
Resolve inherited source paths through the applicable source-visible composed or layer-stack context rather than only through the layer where the inherit arc was authored.
Reject property paths in inherit path items.
Diagnose a missing inherited prim source path.
Include the inherit-authoring prim path and inherited source path in diagnostics.
Treat same-path local layer-stack target opinions as stronger than inherited opinions in this bounded source.
Keep implied upstream inherited opinions stronger than weaker reference-introduced or payload-introduced target opinions.
Require inherited opinions to be modeled as stronger than variants, relocates, references, payloads, and specializes in LIVERPS.
Place usd-specializes-namespace-source after usd-inherits-namespace-source in graph evaluation order when specializes are in scope.
Place usd-variant-namespace-source after the terminal non-variant namespace-source provider so variant selection can observe inherited non-variant opinions.
Document that evaluation order is distinct from LIVERPS field-strength order.

When an inherit arc authored in a weaker referenced or otherwise introduced layer stack targets an absolute source path, include stronger upstream layer-stack opinions at that same source path as implied inherited contributors.
Preserve source-visible layer strength among implied inherited contributors.
Preserve enough target-opinion provenance to avoid weaker reference-introduced fields overriding stronger implied inherited fields.
Do not diagnose absence of an implied contributor when no upstream layer-stack site contributes at the inherited source path.

spec_refs: aousd/specifications-public@v1.0.1:specification/composition/README.md:438 composition algorithm for each inherit prim path
obligations: Expand inherit paths authored on inherited source prims transitively.
Order a source prim's own opinions stronger than opinions introduced by that source prim's inherit arcs.
Detect recursive inherit cycles using semantic paths and mapping context; diagnose cycles without unbounded recursion or crashes.
Expose inherited composed prims and properties through the namespace-source boundary.
Allow usd-stage-population to populate inherited prims and properties without evaluating inherits itself.
Preserve composed child and property ordering when consumed by stage population.
